PTR_AP.Settings.AutoDetect.Name: Auto-detect charge frequencies
PTR_AP.Settings.AutoDetect.Hint: Automatically creates charge tracking from item frequency text such as Scene x2, Daily x3, Scene, or Daily.
PTR_AP.Settings.ClampAp.Name: Clamp unusable AP
PTR_AP.Settings.ClampAp.Hint: Warns and clamps Action Points when an update would exceed the usable AP after Bind and Drain.
PTR_AP.Settings.ChatApChanges.Name: Show manual AP changes in chat
PTR_AP.Settings.ChatApChanges.Hint: Also posts manual AP Bind, Drain, and full reset changes to chat. Interface notifications are always shown.
PTR_AP.Manual.Title: Manual AP
PTR_AP.FullResetSelected: Full AP reset for selected tokens
PTR_AP.Confirm.FullReset.Title: Confirm Full AP Reset
PTR_AP.Confirm.FullReset.Content: Reset current AP, manual Bind AP, manual Drain AP, active module Bind/Drain states, and charges for {names}?
PTR_AP.Notify.ApClamped: {name} can only use {usable} AP after Bind and Drain.
PTR_AP.Notify.ManualAdjust: {name}: {change} {kind} AP applied manually. Current manual value: {value}.
PTR_AP.Notify.FullReset: {name}: full AP reset completed. Current AP restored to {ap}.
PTR_AP.Notify.NoSelectedTokens: No selected owned tokens to reset.
